query: sickly yellow green tint photograph unhealthy skin tone
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — yellow/green sickly tints, jaundice and unhealthy color casts

response.objective_caption: A person with brown hair wearing a red and white checkered shirt lies on their side on an off-white pillow with their eyes closed, one hand raised near their shoulder, against a dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person with brown hair wearing a red and white checkered shirt lies on their side on an off-white pillow with their eyes closed, one hand raised near their shoulder, against a dark background; the entire scene is suffused with a sickly orange-yellow cast that shifts the skin tone toward an unnatural, jaundiced hue.
